Event: Mermaid Adventure
Event Date: 11/06/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: A229
Sea Battle artifact

Triggers: 8 sec

Gorgon's Volley
The artifact owner fires a rocket at a random enemy. The rocket removes 3 random positive effects, deals 350000 magic damage, and petrifies the target. The target takes 35% more damage and can't move for 3 sec. If the target is petrified before the rocket hits them, the rocket removes all positive effects, deals 300000 pure damage, and turns them into a boulder for 3 sec. The target can't move and takes 45% more damage. The target also takes 125000 magic damage every second second for the duration.

When the effect runs out, the target explodes. The explosion deals 150000 pure damage to the target, and their physical and magic armor are reduced by 30% for 3 sec. 2 nearby enemies are hit by rocks. The rocks deal 350000 physical damage on impact and stun for 2 sec.

Once in a while the artifact owner starts firing rockets at a random enemy unit every second for 4 sec.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet

First trigger: 8 sec

Cooldown: 12 secs
